About Chef Will

Where technique meets heart

Chef Will — William Gabriel Pereira — brings 16 years spanning the tech industry, restaurant management, and professional kitchens. A rare combination of business acumen and culinary mastery delivered to every table.

Classically trained, ServeSafe Certified, and bilingual in English and Spanish, Chef Will specializes in 15+ world cuisines. With deep personal experience living with Celiac disease (diagnosed 2001), Chef Will brings unparalleled expertise in gluten-free, vegan, allergen-safe cooking — not as an afterthought, but as a craft.

What I Offer

Services tailored
for you

Every engagement begins with a free consultation — because great food starts with understanding you, your guests, and your vision.

Personal Chef

In-home cooking for individuals, couples, and families. Weekly meal prep, special occasions, or ongoing culinary support — restaurant-quality food in your home.

✓ Free Consultation Included
Personalized Catering

Custom menus for your event — from intimate dinner parties to large corporate gatherings. Every detail thoughtfully prepared and beautifully presented.

✓ Free Consultation Included
Event Food & Planning

Full-service event food planning from concept to execution. Menu curation, logistics, staffing coordination, and on-site culinary management for seamless events.

✓ Free Consultation Included
Hospitality Consulting

Strategic consulting for food businesses drawing on 16 years in restaurant management and tech. Menu development, kitchen workflow, and staff training.

✓ Free Consultation Included
Menu Design

Creative menu development and design for restaurants, pop-ups, and special events. Balanced, seasonal menus that reflect your brand, dietary needs, and culinary vision.

✓ Free Consultation Included
Allergen & Dietary Planning

Specialized menus for celiac, gluten-free, vegan, and allergy-restricted guests. Safe, delicious, and never an afterthought — backed by lived expertise since 2001.

✓ Free Consultation Included

Transparent Pricing

Client Reviews

What people are saying

Real words from real clients — Chef Will would love to add your story to this list.

★★★★★

"Chef Will transformed our dinner party into an unforgettable experience. The food was restaurant-quality, the presentation was stunning, and he handled every dietary restriction with ease. Our guests are still talking about it."

S.M.
Sarah M.
Virginia Beach, VA
★★★★★

"As someone with Celiac disease I'm always nervous about eating at events. Chef Will understood immediately — no cross-contamination, no guesswork, just incredible gluten-free food that tasted better than anything I've had in years."

J.R.
James R.
Richmond, VA
★★★★★

"We hired Chef Will for our corporate luncheon — 40 guests with a mix of vegan, halal, and allergy requirements. He handled everything flawlessly. Professional, creative, and the food was absolutely outstanding."

D.L.
Diana L.
Norfolk, VA
